flags.description: Simulate the execution without changing state
flags.name: --dry-run

flags.description: Version of the GitLab CE container image to deploy (default "18.10.1-ce.0")
flags.name: --gitlab-version string

flags.description: Remove GitLab CE and strip JWT from Vault
flags.name: -d, --disable

flags.description: Deploy GitLab CE and configure Vault JWT
flags.name: -e, --enable

flags.description: Force a clean redeployment of the entire environment
flags.name: -f, --force
